gaps.description: EXPECTED_DBB: code_exec spec says AsyncFunction eval; implementation uses quickjs-emscripten sandbox instead (browser-compatible but diverges from spec wording)
AgenticConfig.apiKey typed as required string even for provider='custom', forcing callers to pass a dummy value; type should be optional for custom provider
PRD: ask() multi-round agent loop terminates on stopReason !== 'tool_use'
PRD: code_exec with quickjs sandbox, auto-language detection, Pyodide (browser) / python3 subprocess (Node), fs injection
PRD: Provider config fields (provider, apiKey, model, baseUrl, customProvider, systemPrompt)
PRD: AgenticResult shape (answer, sources, images, codeResults, files, toolCalls, usage, shellResults)
DBB: AgenticResult.images populated from tool results
DBB: systemPrompt passed to provider system field
DBB: provider='custom' invokes customProvider, skips apiKey validation
DBB: Missing/empty apiKey throws before network call for anthropic/openai
